name: idrive-cloud-drive-workspace
description: Workspace for the unofficial IDrive Cloud Drive SDK and CLI

scripts.build: npm run build -w idrive-sdk && npm run build -w idrive-cli
scripts.check: npm run release:consistency && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm test && npm run pack:check
scripts.dev: npm run build -w idrive-sdk && tsx packages/cli/src/cli.ts
scripts.release:check: npm run check && npm run build
scripts.test: npm run build -w idrive-sdk && vitest run --reporter=verbose
scripts.test:coverage: npm run build -w idrive-sdk && vitest run --coverage --reporter=verbose
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w idrive-sdk && tsc --noEmit && tsc -p packages/cli/tsconfig.json --noEmit
